title: Collection of helper and miscellaneous functions used for and by the Oxford University Clinical Research Unit (OUCRU), Vietnam
text: Basic example using OUCRU color palette ggplot2
code: library(ggplot2) library(oucru)  p <- ggplot(mpg, aes(hwy, class, fill = drv)) +   geom_violin(show.legend = FALSE)  # typical figure with viridis colors p +   scale_fill_viridis_d() +   ggtitle("Using viridis colors") # use OUCRU main color palette p +   scale_fill_oucru_d(palette = "main") +   ggtitle("Using OUCRU colors")
